info.name: HIS Backend Smoke Tests
info.description: 端到端冒烟测试套件，覆盖 HIS 系统完整主线闭环（挂号→看病→缴费→发药）及异常边界场景。需先启动全 Docker 栈（docker compose up -d --build）。

item.name: 1 - Authentication
item.description: 7 角色登录、token 验证、鉴权边界测试

item.name: 2 - Reference Data
item.description: 获取挂号级别、结算类别、医技项目、疾病、药品的 ID 供后续流程使用

item.name: 3 - Registration (Finance)
item.description: 财务角色：窗口挂号 (F1-1)、退号 (F1-2)、异常测试

item.name: 4 - Physician (Consult & Medical Record)
item.description: 门诊医生：患者查看、接诊 (F2-1)、病历首页 (F2-2)

body.raw: {"readme":"咳嗽三天，伴有咽痛","present":"无发热，无呼吸困难","present_treat":"自行服用感冒药无效","history":"既往体健","allergy":"无","physique":"T37.2 P80 R20 BP120/80","proposal":"建议完善相关检查","disease_ids":[{{disease_id}}]}

item.name: 5 - Physician (Orders)
item.description: 门诊医生：检查申请 (F2-3)、检验申请 (F2-4)

item.name: 6 - Charge (Finance) - Round 1
item.description: 财务角色：查询待缴费 → 收费结算检查+检验 (F1-3)

exec: const refs = d.data.items.map(i => ({item_type: i.item_type, id: i.id}));
pm.test('1 check request with 已缴费', () => { pm.expect(d.data).to.be.an('array').with.lengthOf.at.least(1); pm.expect(d.data[0].state).to.eql('已缴费'); });

body.raw: {"result":"双肺纹理清晰，未见明显异常"}

exec: pm.test('1 inspection request with 已缴费', () => { pm.expect(d.data).to.be.an('array').with.lengthOf.at.least(1); pm.expect(d.data[0].state).to.eql('已缴费'); });

body.raw: {"result":"白细胞正常，各项指标均在参考范围内"}

item.name: 8 - Physician (Results, Diagnosis, Prescription)
item.description: 门诊医生：查看结果 (F2-6/F2-7)、确诊 (F2-8)、开立处方 (F2-9)

exec: pm.test('State is 已出结果', () => { pm.expect(d.data[0].state).to.eql('已出结果'); });
pm.test('State is 已出结果', () => { pm.expect(d.data[0].state).to.eql('已出结果'); });

body.raw: {"diagnosis":"急性上呼吸道感染","cure":"多休息多饮水，清淡饮食","finish":true}

item.name: 9 - Prescription Charge & Pharmacy
item.description: 处方收费 (F1-3) + 药房发药 (F5-1) + 交易记录 (F5-4)

exec: const refs = d.data.items.map(i => ({item_type: i.item_type, id: i.id}));
pm.test('Drug state = 已缴费', () => { pm.expect(d.data.items[0].drug_state).to.eql('已缴费'); });

item.name: 10 - Error & Edge Cases
item.description: RBAC 跨角色鉴权、参数校验、边界条件
